title: Knights of Honor

notes:
Game does have an issue with mouse pointer but that can be easily fixed. I just alt-tab out and in of the game and the pointer resets to a working position.
Also, the game can be run in windowed mode, search the web, there are many solutions.
Just remember, this game was released in 2005, there was no 1080p or widescreen support back then. I play on a 27" screen and the game is displayed on a quarter of the screen, but I don't mind that.
Everything else works just fine.
title: Knights of Honor

notes:
Installed the HD patch from https://www.moddb.com/mods/knights-of-honor-ultimate-mod/downloads :

env STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/25830 ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 3.16\ Beta/proton run ~/Downloads/KoH-PatchHD-v3.1.0-b180.exe

Other than that, ran as usual. Works well, but runs in a window.
